question_text: Myopia mein patient ko kahan ka dhundhla (blur) dikhta hai?
explanation: Myopia mein distance objects blur dikhte hain kyunki light retina ke aage focus hoti hai.

question_text: Hypermetropia ko thik karne ke liye kaunse lens ka upyog kiya jata hai?
explanation: Hypermetropia mein convex (plus) lens use hota hai jo light ko retina par focus karta hai.

question_text: Jab light rays Retina ke aage focus hoti hain, toh us beemari ko kya kehte hain?
explanation: Myopia mein light retina ke aage focus hoti hai.

question_text: Astigmatism mein light ek point par focus hone ki jagah alag-alag points par focus hoti hai. Iska main kaaran kya hai?
explanation: Astigmatism cornea ke irregular curvature ke karan hota hai.

question_text: 40 saal ki umarr ke baad jo paas ki nazar kamzor hoti hai, use kya kehte hain?
Agar kisi patient ki vision Pinhole lagane se sudhar jati hai, toh iska kya matlab hai?
explanation: Pinhole improvement refractive error indicate karta hai.

question_text: Myopia ko aur kis naam se jana jata hai?
explanation: Myopia ko near-sightedness bhi kehte hain.

question_text: Hypermetropia mein light rays Retina ke kahan focus hoti hain?
explanation: Hypermetropia mein light retina ke piche focus hoti hai.

question_text: Cylindrical number ka istemal kis condition ko thik karne ke liye kiya jata hai?
explanation: Cylindrical correction astigmatism ke liye use hota hai.

question_text: Refractive error ka sabse common symptom kya hai?
explanation: Blurred vision refractive error ka primary symptom hai.
